# lore_engine.py

## Sacred Function
Generates lore narratives, archetype profiles, and symbolic story fragments for SacredSpace OS. Feeds council sessions with mythopoetic context, drives NPC characterization, and seeds the Obsidian vault with living lore. The full engine (794 lines) handles archetype logic, episode generation, and resonance scoring.
